subject: Update schema service to support v20

Patch Set 1:

@Sylvain, where do we get more information like for example kubectl logs of the pod or the logs inside the pods.
I have deployed changed into google cloud multiple times and it started successfully without an problem.
From the results page, I can only see that the schema service pod is not starting but it doesn't provide information why its failing to start. 
Any additional information why its failing would be really useful.

Patch Set 1: -Code-Review

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> @Sylvain, where do we get more information like for example kubectl logs of the pod or the logs inside the pods.
> I have deployed changed into google cloud multiple times and it started successfully without an problem.
> From the results page, I can only see that the schema service pod is not starting but it doesn't provide information why its failing to start. 
> Any additional information why its failing would be really useful.

Easiest is to go to the gating results: https://gating-results.onap.eu/results//111381-1/
Then You select "infrastructure-healthcheck" --> "onap-k8s" --> You find Your pod and click on it.

Next, you go to container section, and click on Your container --> you`ll get K8S logs contents for this container. in case of aai-schema-service, You got this:

Data Router doesn't have any REST API, it is background process that reads events from dmaap and writes to search data service and it doesn't impact any other components like SO.

Patch Set 3: Code-Review+1

+1 then!
